title: Neuroloma runcinatum
taxonomy: Neuroloma runcinatum belongs to the family Apiaceae. This classification places it within the order Apiales, a group of plants that also includes carrots and parsley. Neuroloma runcinatum is a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. Its classification is further supported by its botanical characteristics, such as its fern-like leaves and umbrella-like inflorescences. Within the family Apiaceae, Neuroloma runcinatum is a member of the tribe Apieae.
